title: Current data for 2026 DRC BDBV Outbreak
text:
This page shows current data from the 2026 DRC BDBV outbreak. The data are updated automatically from the INRB-UMIE repository
Only raw data from confirmed cases are shown here. For data with more context, see the INRB-UMIE dashboard, or the current forecast estimates by Abbot et. al..

Download the current case data here. (Last data update: 2026-07-05 13:13:36)
